name: SynSur: An end-to-end generative pipeline for synthetic industrial surface defect generation and detection

description: arXiv:2604.26633v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Industrial surface defect inspection suffers from a fundamental data bottleneck: defects are rare, annotations require expert knowledge, and collecting balanced training sets is slow and costly. We present SynSur, an end-to-end pipeline for synthetic defect generation and automatic annotation, designed to reduce the manual effort and dat...
author: Paul Julius K\"uhn, Mika Pommeranz, Arjan Kuijper, Saptarshi Neil Sinha
